title: SynoptiQ: Neural Source Criticism for the Synoptic Problem
description: A neural source-criticism framework for the Synoptic Problem: a token-aligned Koine Greek corpus of Matthew, Mark, and Luke; two published Ancient-Greek models (KoineFormer and Koine-T5); a preregistered source-criticism study; and an honest account of what the texts can and cannot reveal, including the negative result that the direction of literary copying is not identifiable from the texts alone.
